items.title: Britney Spears charged in California with driving under influence
items.summary: The pop star's representatives have called the incident "completely inexcusable" and she has since checked herself into rehab.

items.title: ‘Systemic failures’ made tribal man take his sister’s skeletal remains to bank, finds probe in Odisha
items.summary: Revenue Divisional Commissioner, who is heading a State government probe, said there was delay in issuing death certificate to the deceased’s family
